Location: 16:34 - 18:2
Root: Effect.fail("error").pipe(\n  Effect.catchAll((cause) => Effect.fail(new MyErrorTagged(cause)))\n)
Path (4 nodes):
  [0] root {effect A=never E=MyErrorTagged R=never} pipeline
      ==> [subject] -> [1]
  [1] pipeSubject {plain A="error"} "error"
      ~> [call] -> [2]

      ==> [pipeable] -> [3]
  [3] pipeTransformation {effect A=never E=MyErrorTagged R=never} step 1: Effect.catchAll
